recommendations.text: Before merging the daily-credit-limit guardrail feature (PR branch copilot/fix-daily-credit-limit-test), bundle check_daily_effective_workflow_guardrail.cjs into the action package — the compiled activation job require()s it but it is not present in /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/actions/, so the activation job throws MODULE_NOT_FOUND and reds the run even though the agent is correctly skipped. All 4 PR review workflows on the branch fail identically. Add/extend the CI smoke test that node-requires EVERY .cjs referenced by the activation job (same gap that produced the 06-06 minimatch crash). Dev-confined today but will hit prod main if merged unbundled.

VERIFY-FIXED: copilot_sdk_driver.cjs MODULE_NOT_FOUND 'minimatch' was the dominant 06-06 failure (6 workflows) but is ABSENT 2026-06-07 across 28 copilot runs — appears resolved. Confirm the sdk-driver build now bundles minimatch and keep the node-require CI smoke test in place to prevent regression. Close after one more clean window.

Make the detection (prompt-injection scan) result parser tolerant of a missing THREAT_DETECTION_RESULT marker: when continue-on-error=true and the marker is absent, treat as 'no threat detected / inconclusive' and exit non-red instead of ERR_PARSE failing the detection job (which reddens the whole run even though the agent succeeded). Optionally retry the detection prompt once. Seen on Design Decision Gate 27065879421.

ESCALATE — unfixed 3 consecutive days (06-05/06/07), failing 2 prod-main schedules DAILY. Add model/param preflight validation at compile or activation time: (1) reject/warn when an engine config pins a model that does not exist at the provider endpoint — codex Cache Strategy now 404s on gpt-5-codex-alpha-2025-11-07 (id was rotated from adelie-alpha-2026-02-19 but STILL 404, so pinning a fresh id is not keeping pace; use a stable alias); (2) reject/strip params the model does not support — claude Caveman returns 400 'does not support the effort parameter'. Both waste an entire scheduled run (all retries exhausted, 0 tokens) on a static config error. Fix the frontmatter of Daily Caveman Optimizer (drop effort param) and Daily Cache Strategy Analyzer (valid codex model id/alias) NOW.

Add a soft pre-cap guard for heavy daily-aggregation workflows (Daily Ambient Context Optimizer ran 25.37M eff this window, OVER the 25M cap, and only narrowly succeeded): chunk/stream the context or set a 22-23M effective-token ceiling that triggers graceful summarization before hitting the hard 25M 429. #35661.

Make the safe_outputs job tolerant of per-item failures: when the agent succeeded and >=1 item landed, exit non-red with a partial-success summary instead of failing the whole job on a single rejected item. RECUR 2026-06-06 (PR Sous Chef sub_agent_error reddened the job after a 34-turn successful agent run).
For add_comment with target='*', require/inject item_number at emit-time or give the agent a clearer schema hint. Not triggered 2026-06-05 but fix not yet shipped.

Fix copilot-sdk-driver tool-permission mapping: the sdk-driver denies read on repo source/_test.go files and shell(sed/ls/cat) on /tmp/gh-aw/cache-memory that the workflow legitimately configures, aborting after 5 denials. Reconcile the allow-tool entries derived from GH_AW_COPILOT_SDK_SERVER_ARGS with the workflow's declared tools. RECUR 2026-06-07 on Daily Safe Output Integrator (27101776716, 13 denials; denied read(pkg/workflow/*_test.go) + shell(sed ...safe_outputs_config.go)). Narrower than 06-06 (1 wf vs 3) but persisting 5+ windows.

Investigate why Test Quality Sentinel [copilot] reddened the agent job despite producing a complete valid agent_output report (27 turns, no crash, error_count=0). Capture full harness stdio (the log appeared truncated to report markdown) to isolate the nonzero exit. Distinguish from the copilot-sdk-driver class.
Add label + temporary_id support to the create_discussion safe-output surface (re-requested by Smoke Copilot probe 2026-06-05).
